note: Founder rule: Languy speaks in HIS clone or not at all. Clone needs ElevenLabs Creator tier. After subscribing: LANGUY_VOICE_ID=y890cvKT1HyO5X5tiKUB npx tsx scripts/gen-voice-sofia.ts

lines.text: No warm-up. No small talk. She skipped straight to loving me. I am not equipped for this. I am rock.
Opening line. Match her energy. …My energy is a slow tide and mild dread.
I said I was fine and her heart visibly broke. I have made an angel sad. This is so much worse than rejection.
Feeling. On command. She is already crying happy tears and I have produced zero syllables. The pressure.
A real test. Do I know it… or did being loved that hard just scramble my whole motherboard?
One more. Just one. …She loved me before I earned it. Turns out I’d been waiting for that. Don’t tell her.
